data.openai_compat.py:
"""
OpenAI-Compatible API Proxy for AI Agent Service.

Exposes /v1/chat/completions so that ANY service using the OpenAI SDK
can point OPENAI_BASE_URL=http://ai-agent:9006 and route through
the central LLM orchestrator.

Also supports /v1/models for model listing.
"""

import time
import uuid
from typing import Any, Dict, List, Optional
from fastapi import APIRouter, HTTPException, Request
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field

from src.core.llm_service import LLMService
from src.config.logging import get_logger
from src.errors.exceptions import LLMProviderError, RateLimitExceededError

logger = get_logger(__name__)

router = APIRouter()


# ── OpenAI-compatible request/response models ──

class ChatMessage(BaseModel):
    role: str
    content: str

class ChatCompletionRequest(BaseModel):
    model: str = "gemini-2.0-flash"
    messages: List[ChatMessage]
    max_tokens: Optional[int] = 2000
    temperature: Optional[float] = 0.7
    top_p: Optional[float] = None
    stream: bool = False
    n: int = 1

class Usage(BaseModel):
    prompt_tokens: int = 0
    completion_tokens: int = 0
    total_tokens: int = 0

class ChatCompletionChoice(BaseModel):
    index: int = 0
    message: ChatMessage
    finish_reason: str = "stop"

class ChatCompletionResponse(BaseModel):
    id: str
    object: str = "chat.completion"
    created: int
    model: str
    choices: List[ChatCompletionChoice]
    usage: Usage


@router.post("/chat/completions")
async def openai_chat_completions(data: ChatCompletionRequest, request: Request):
    """
    OpenAI-compatible /v1/chat/completions endpoint.
    
    Routes all requests through the central LLM service.
    Services can use this by setting:
      OPENAI_BASE_URL=http://ai-agent:9006/v1
      OPENAI_API_KEY=not-needed
    """
    logger.info(f"OpenAI-compat request: model={data.model}, messages={len(data.messages)}")
    
    # Extract system prompt and user prompt from messages
    system_prompt = None
    user_prompt = ""
    for msg in data.messages:
        if msg.role == "system":
            system_prompt = msg.content
        elif msg.role == "user":
            user_prompt = msg.content
        elif msg.role == "assistant":
            # For multi-turn, append to context
            pass
    
    if not user_prompt:
        # Fallback: use last message content
        user_prompt = data.messages[-1].content if data.messages else ""

    redis = None
    if hasattr(request.app.state, "redis"):
        redis = request.app.state.redis

    service = LLMService(redis)
    
    try:
        response = await service.generate(
            prompt=user_prompt,
            system_prompt=system_prompt,
            model=None,  # Use default (Gemini) — ignore requested model name
            max_tokens=data.max_tokens or 2000,
            temperature=data.temperature or 0.7,
            use_cache=True,
        )
        
        # Build OpenAI-compatible response
        completion_id = f"chatcmpl-{uuid.uuid4().hex[:24]}"
        
        return ChatCompletionResponse(
            id=completion_id,
            created=int(time.time()),
            model=response.model or data.model,
            choices=[
                ChatCompletionChoice(
                    index=0,
                    message=ChatMessage(
                        role="assistant",
                        content=response.content or "",
                    ),
                    finish_reason="stop",
                )
            ],
            usage=Usage(
                prompt_tokens=response.usage.prompt_tokens if response.usage else 0,
                completion_tokens=response.usage.completion_tokens if response.usage else 0,
                total_tokens=response.usage.total_tokens if response.usage else 0,
            ),
        )
    
    except RateLimitExceededError:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=429, detail={"error": {"message": "Rate limit exceeded", "type": "rate_limit_error"}})
    except LLMProviderError as e:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=502, detail={"error": {"message": str(e), "type": "api_error"}})
    except Exception as e:
        logger.error(f"OpenAI-compat error: {e}")
        raise HTTPException(status_code=500, detail={"error": {"message": str(e), "type": "internal_error"}})


@router.get("/models")
async def list_models():
    """OpenAI-compatible /v1/models endpoint."""
    return {
        "object": "list",
        "data": [
            {
                "id": "gemini-2.0-flash",
                "object": "model",
                "created": 1700000000,
                "owned_by": "google",
            },
            {
                "id": "default",
                "object": "model", 
                "created": 1700000000,
                "owned_by": "flowmaster",
            },
        ]
    }


@router.post("/embeddings")
async def create_embeddings(request: Request):
    """
    Stub for /v1/embeddings — returns error directing services to use 
    the ai-agent generate endpoint instead.
    """
    raise HTTPException(
        status_code=501,
        detail={"error": {"message": "Embeddings not yet supported via proxy. Use /api/llm/generate.", "type": "not_implemented"}}
    )
